title: Greenidge Announces Continued Power Capacity Expansion
text: Greenidge Power Capacity Expansion Announcement. South Carolina Power Access: Greenidge announced 60 MW of low-cost power secured in South Carolina. Supports continued expansion of power generation and datacenter operations. Mississippi Expansion: Access to 40 MW of additional low-cost power at Mississippi facility by July 2026. Strategic Power Growth: Total power capacity expansion supports AI and HPC datacenter transition. New York Facility: Continued investment in Dresden facility operations and capacity. Multi-State Network: Building distributed power generation and datacenter network across US. Strategic Rationale: Low-cost power critical for profitable mining and datacenter operations. Regional power advantages leveraged for cost optimization. Regulatory Support: New York air permit renewal supports long-term operations. Power agreements provide certainty for investment plans. Growth Trajectory: Expanding power infrastructure enables scaling of mining and datacenter operations. Supporting transition from bitcoin mining to AI/HPC infrastructure.
